title: Root README was not a complete onboarding entry point
description: The README described much of the pipeline but lacked the requested requirements, repository map and consolidated known-limitations sections.

title: Cross-module ordering and sign conventions lacked one canonical page
description: Ordering, sign, reference and unit rules were distributed across module guides, making dangerous MeshData/DOLFINx boundaries harder to discover.

title: No compact public API map existed
description: A package-by-package API map was generated from the current __init__.py exports, including locator, marker, Green cache and inverse benchmark APIs.

title: Performance documentation mixed user commands with historical audit findings
description: A current user-facing profiling guide and scripts README were added; the historical performance review remains available separately.

title: Point-location bottleneck description predated locator objects
description: The review and issue JSON now mark repeated brute-force location and repeated node-to-DOF matching as fixed for the current serial P1 path.

title: Forward command referenced removed main.py
description: The command now uses the existing examples/forward_pipeline.py CLI.

title: Single-reference CLI lacked reference_index
description: The parser advertised reference=single but could not pass the required index. --reference-index was added to both full examples and the full profiling script.

title: Transfer shape and partial-row identity needed stronger documentation
description: The tensor shape, measurement_row_indices, signed candidate matrix and sign diagnostics are now explicit.

title: Full-example outputs and surface diagnostics needed clearer interpretation
description: Physical-group requirements, source candidate semantics, ParaView markers, non-compacted surface points and projection id -1 are documented.

title: Public exports were complete
description: No existing public function required an additional __init__.py export during this audit.
